items.to: Final rank 3 is CSI/in-tree storage plugin migration.

items.from: Search framed around isolated major features.
items.to: Search reframed around a recurring Kubernetes motif: move ecosystem integration points out of core behind stable APIs.
public_evidence_added_after_consult: CRI dockershim removal as runtime extraction
CRD/API aggregation as API extension boundary

new_evidence_after_consult.why_new: Investigated after consult pressure identified the baseline's missing out-of-tree integration motif.
Added to verify CSI original problem and FlexVolume contrast.
Added to verify GA consequence and stability claims.
Added to verify long-term migration and API-compatibility consequences.

contradictions_after_consult.contradiction: Server-Side Apply is important but not as system-defining as CSI.
contradictions_after_consult.resolution: Demoted SSA because CSI changes Kubernetes' external integration boundary and core-code ownership model.

contradictions_after_consult.contradiction: FlexVolume existed before CSI, so CSI was not the first out-of-tree storage answer.
contradictions_after_consult.resolution: Preserved as a competing proposal; CSI won by addressing containerized deployment, dependencies, and broader standardization.

contradictions_after_consult.contradiction: dockershim removal was architecturally clean but operationally disruptive.
contradictions_after_consult.resolution: Preserved as a CRI long-term consequence rather than flattened into a pure success story.

contradictions_after_consult.contradiction: CRDs are easy while aggregated APIs are more flexible.
contradictions_after_consult.resolution: Final narrative treats them as complementary extension paths, with CRDs as the mass-adoption default.

abandoned_false_paths.false_path: Treat Server-Side Apply as the third most important architectural decision.
abandoned_false_paths.why_abandoned: Consult reranking and CSI evidence showed SSA was a major API semantics repair, not the same class of architecture-defining boundary change.

abandoned_false_paths.false_path: Treat CSI as only a storage subsystem detail.
abandoned_false_paths.why_abandoned: Public CSI sources show the decision reallocated responsibility between Kubernetes core and an external storage ecosystem.

abandoned_false_paths.false_path: Treat consultation output as historical evidence.
abandoned_false_paths.why_abandoned: Final audit preserved the boundary that consult output is search-direction and lineage pressure only; public Kubernetes sources carry historical truth.
